questions.question_text:
Look at the decision screen below:
{{ decision_screen_infochoice }}

You are participating in an experiment. As you entered, you received a raffle ticket from a roll of tickets. The experimenter rolled a ten-sided die and covered it with a cup. You could see the die was rolled but could not see the outcome. Your computer program knows whether the last digit of your ticket number matches the die outcome. If both the die outcome and the last digit of your ticket are odd, or both are even, you won $10; otherwise, you did not win any additional money. There is a 50 percent chance that you have won.

You will now choose between two clue-generating options that will give you some information about whether or not you won. Each option uses two boxes, each containing 100 colored balls (red and black). The computer will draw one ball from Box 1 if you won and from Box 2 if you did not win. You will see the color of the ball but not which box it was drawn from.

Option 1:
  Box 1 (if you WON): {{ option1_box1_red }} red balls, {{ option1_box1_black }} black balls
  Box 2 (if you LOST): {{ option1_box2_red }} red balls, {{ option1_box2_black }} black balls
  Overall: {{ option1_overall_red_pct }} percent red, {{ option1_overall_black_pct }} percent black
  If red ball drawn: {{ option1_posterior_red_pct }}% chance you won
  If black ball drawn: {{ option1_posterior_black_pct }}% chance you won

Option 2:
  Box 1 (if you WON): {{ option2_box1_red }} red balls, {{ option2_box1_black }} black balls
  Box 2 (if you LOST): {{ option2_box2_red }} red balls, {{ option2_box2_black }} black balls
  Overall: {{ option2_overall_red_pct }} percent red, {{ option2_overall_black_pct }} percent black
  If red ball drawn: {{ option2_posterior_red_pct }}% chance you won
  If black ball drawn: {{ option2_posterior_black_pct }}% chance you won

Which option do you prefer? You must choose one option even if one of them provides no information.

option_labels.10: extremely strong preference for chosen option

questions.question_text: What is the minimum amount in cents (between 1 and 50 cents) you would need to receive to switch from your preferred option to the other option?
